mapper.select: SELECT quest_id, title, description, category, reward_exp, reward_point, status, created_at FROM LQ_QUEST WHERE status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY quest_id DESC
SELECT quest_id, title, description, category, reward_exp, reward_point, status, created_at FROM LQ_QUEST WHERE quest_id = #{questId} AND status != 'DELETED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_QUEST ( quest_id, title, description, category, reward_exp, reward_point, status, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_QUEST_PK.nextval, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{rewardExp}, #{rewardPoint}, #{status}, sysdate )
